chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-306 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha peshi. 24-01-2018 Mr. Khadim Hussain Soomro advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad, P.I Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Manzoor Ahmed on behalf of SHO PS Qazi Ahmed. After hearing the learned counsel for the parties at some length, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that this petition may be disposed of with direction to the trial Court that as and when the petitioners file their application under section 265-K Cr.P.C. before trial Court, the same may be decided after hearing the parties in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. has raised no objection on the above proposition. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of a with direction to the learned trial Court that as and when petitioners file application under section 265-K Cr.P.C. for premature acquittal of the petitioners, the same may be decided after hearing parties in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
